mapper.insert: insert into bc_userprofile (id, user_id, name, nickname, language, location, courseware, gender, tel, year_of_birth, level_of_education, allow_certificate, country, is_del, user_slug, meta, mailing_address, goals, city) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseware,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yearOfBirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelOfEducation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{allowCertificate,jdbcType=BIT}, #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDel,jdbcType=BIT}, #{userSlug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{meta,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{mailingAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{goals,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.update: update bc_userprofile set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, language = #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, courseware = #{courseware,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, year_of_birth = #{yearOfBirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_of_education = #{levelOfEducation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, allow_certificate = #{allowCertificate,jdbcType=BIT}, country = #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_del = #{isDel,jdbcType=BIT}, user_slug = #{userSlug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, meta = #{meta,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, mailing_address = #{mailingAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, goals = #{goals,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, name, nickname, language, location, courseware, gender, tel, year_of_birth, level_of_education, allow_certificate, country, is_del, user_slug, meta, mailing_address, goals, city from bc_userprofile where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select id, user_id, name, nickname, language, location, courseware, gender, tel, year_of_birth, level_of_education, allow_certificate, country, is_del, user_slug, meta, mailing_address, goals, city from bc_userprofile
